designNotes.skillBaseline: Chaos AoE+DoT (3s, 0.30 dotDamagePercent), 0.7 SPR, 5s CD. Consumes Plagued for pandemic: spread all active DoTs from primary target to ALL pack enemies.

buildIdentities.plague_doctor: Pandemic mastery — DoT spread amplifier. Toads consuming Plagued is the build-defining moment.
buildIdentities.spirit_caller: Toads as miniature minions — count toward minion-bound effects, leap to spawn spirits.
buildIdentities.voodoo_master: Toads as crit/burst payoff — soul stack consumes empower impacts, hex synergy.

branches.theme: Toads are a delivery mechanism for plague. Pandemic mastered, debuffs amplified.

nodes.name: Venomous Impact
nodes.description: Toads apply +1/2 additional stacks of Poisoned per impact.
engineFields: poisonStackPerImpact (NEW — numeric; staff.ts postCast for staff_plague_of_toads applies extra poisoned stacks per hit)

nodes.name: Toxic Burst
nodes.description: Toad impacts have 25/50% chance to apply Bleeding (3s).
engineFields: procs[onHit] (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Pandemic Master
nodes.description: Pandemic spread now uses 100% snapshot (full source damage) on spread DoTs (instead of default 50%).
engineFields: rawBehaviors.pandemicFullSnapshot (NEW — staff.ts preRoll for staff_plague_of_toads pandemic logic: pass snapshotPercent=100)

nodes.name: Disease Catalyst
nodes.description: +5/10% Toads damage per debuff on target.
engineFields: conditionalMods.perAilmentStackOnTarget (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Toad Plague
nodes.description: +20/40% Toads damage on Plagued targets.
engineFields: conditionalMods.whileDebuffActive (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Crit Splash
nodes.description: Toads critical strikes apply 1/2 stacks each of Poisoned and Bleeding to all hit enemies.
engineFields: procs[onCrit] (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Chaos Mastery
nodes.description: +10/20% chaos penetration.
engineFields: chaosPenetration (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Pandemic Burst
nodes.description: Pandemic now ALSO deals 50% of source DoT snapshot as direct chaos damage to each spread target.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.pandemicBurstPercent (NEW — staff.ts preRoll pandemic block: per spread target, emit damage event = sourceSnapshot * value/100)

nodes.name: DoT Support
nodes.description: +15/30% damage to DoT-tagged skills.
engineFields: incDamage (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Eternal Pandemic
nodes.description: Pandemic-spread DoTs receive +100% duration on all spread targets. Cost: −30% Toads direct damage.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.pandemicSpreadDurationBonus (NEW — staff.ts preRoll pandemic block: spread DoT duration *= 1 + value/100); incDamage (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Toad Storm
nodes.description: While Plagued combo state is active on caster, Toads has 0.5s cooldown (instead of 5s). Cost: −60% damage per cast.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.toadStormMode (NEW — staff.ts preRoll: if plagued comboState active and flag set, override effective CD and apply damage penalty)

nodes.name: Stack Compounder
nodes.description: Toads damage +5% per stack of Poisoned/Bleeding currently on the target (caps at +50%).
engineFields: rawBehaviors.toadsStackCompounder (NEW — staff.ts preRoll: count poisoned + bleeding stacks on target, multiply damageMult by 1 + min(maxPercent, sum * perStackPercent)/100)

nodes.name: THE PLAGUE COURT
nodes.description: All enemies in the zone are permanently Plagued. Toads pandemic spreads regardless of consume. Cost: Toads CD +3s.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.plagueCourtAllPlagued (NEW — tick.ts maintenance: apply plagued debuff to all alive enemies if missing); rawBehaviors.toadsAlwaysPandemic (NEW — staff.ts preRoll: trigger pandemic block unconditionally); cooldownIncrease (EXISTS)

branches.theme: Toads are minions. They count, they leap, they spawn more.

nodes.name: Extra Toad
nodes.description: +1/2 toads spawned per cast.
engineFields: toadCount (NEW — numeric; staff.ts postCast adds N to base toad count, adjusts hitCount accordingly)

nodes.name: Toad Leap
nodes.description: Toads have 25/50% chance to leap to a 2nd target after impact at 50% damage.
engineFields: procs[onHit] (EXISTS); rawBehaviors.toadLeapNext (NEW — staff.ts proc handler: pick adjacent pack enemy, emit damage event at percent/100)

nodes.name: Living Toads
nodes.description: Toads count as living minions for 3 seconds after cast (enables whileMinionsAlive conditionals).
engineFields: rawBehaviors.toadsCountAsMinionsSeconds (NEW — staff.ts postCast for staff_plague_of_toads: spawn invisible 'toad' minion with short duration that counts toward activeMinions for conditional checks)

nodes.name: Bound Power
nodes.description: +10/20% Toads damage while any minion is alive.
engineFields: conditionalMods.whileMinionsAlive (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Pack Hunter
nodes.description: +20/40% Toads damage while 2+ minions alive.
engineFields: conditionalMods.whileMinionsAlive (EXISTS) — note: design intent is 2+ minions threshold; needs threshold support if not already in condition handler

nodes.name: Toad Spawn
nodes.description: Toad kills have 20/40% chance to spawn a 2s spirit minion.
engineFields: procs[onKill] (EXISTS); summonMinion (NEW)

nodes.name: Leap Range
nodes.description: Toads can leap to +1/2 additional adjacent targets (independent of T1b chance).
engineFields: toadLeapRange (NEW — numeric; staff.ts postCast extends per-toad target list by N additional pack neighbors at 50% damage)

nodes.name: Minion Bond
nodes.description: Each living minion grants +15% Toads damage AND +1 toad count.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.toadsPerMinionBonus (NEW — staff.ts preRoll for staff_plague_of_toads: damageMult *= 1 + minionCount * damagePercentPerMinion/100; hitCount += minionCount * toadCountPerMinion)

nodes.name: Minion Mastery Support
nodes.description: +15/30% minion damage.
engineFields: minionDamageMult (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Toad Swarm
nodes.description: Toad count is doubled (3 → 6 baseline). Cost: −25% damage per toad.
engineFields: toadCount (NEW); incDamage (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Permanent Toad
nodes.description: 1 toad becomes a permanent 10s minion that attacks rapidly. Recasts replace it. Cost: −50% Toads on-cast damage.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.permanentToadMinion (NEW — staff.ts postCast: spawn fetish-config minion with 10s duration); incDamage (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Hopping Death
nodes.description: Toads bounce 2 extra times after impact at 50% damage each.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.toadHoppingBounces (NEW — staff.ts postCast: per toad, emit N extra damage events to chain neighbors at percent/100)

nodes.name: THE TOAD GOD
nodes.description: All your minion attacks now spawn a 0.5s mini-toad at impact location dealing 25% Toads damage. Cost: −40% direct minion damage.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.toadGodMinionAttacksSpawnToad (NEW — tick.ts minion attack hook: per attack, emit Toads-style damage event at percent/100); minionDamageMult (EXISTS, negative)

branches.theme: Toads as crit/burst payoff. Soul stacks make every impact a finisher.

nodes.name: Sharp Strike
nodes.description: +10/20% Toads critical strike chance.
engineFields: incCritChance (EXISTS) — flavored as toadImpactCritChance per identity matrix

nodes.name: Soul Hop
nodes.description: Toads critical strikes have 25/50% chance to generate 1 soul_stack. ICD 1.5s.
engineFields: procs[onCrit] (EXISTS); createComboState (NEW)

nodes.name: Toad Catalyst
nodes.description: When Toads consumes Plagued, also generate 2 soul_stacks.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.toadsConsumePlaguedSoulStacks (NEW — staff.ts preRoll for staff_plague_of_toads when consuming plagued: createComboState('soul_stack', value))

nodes.name: Hex Synergy
nodes.description: +20/40% Toads damage on Hexed targets.
engineFields: conditionalMods.whileDebuffActive (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Stack Synergy
nodes.description: +5/10% Toads damage per active soul_stack.
engineFields: damagePerSoulStackActive (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Soul Volley
nodes.description: When Toads consumes Plagued, instantly cast Soul Harvest at 50/100% damage on the highest-debuff target. ICD 6s.
engineFields: procs[onCast] (EXISTS); conditionParam.consumedComboState (NEW — checkConditionParam case: ProcContext.consumedComboStateIds includes value); castSkill (NEW)

nodes.name: Quickdraw
nodes.description: −15/30% Toads cooldown.
engineFields: cooldownReduction (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Toad Surge
nodes.description: On Toads cast: gain Toad Surge (+30% damage to your next non-Toads cast in 4s, stacks up to 3).
engineFields: procs[onCast] (EXISTS); BUFF_DEFS.toadSurge (NEW)

nodes.name: Burst Mastery
nodes.description: +20/40% damage to Heavy-tagged skills.
engineFields: incDamage (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Frog Prince
nodes.description: Each toad has 25% chance to be a 'King Toad' dealing 3× damage. Cost: −25% normal toad damage.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.frogPrinceChance + frogPrinceMultiplier (NEW — staff.ts postCast: per toad roll chance; if hit, multiply that toad's damage by multiplier); incDamage (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Cursed Toads
nodes.description: Toads also apply Hexed (5s) on impact. Cost: Toads CD +2s.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.toadsApplyHexed (NEW — staff.ts postCast: per hit, apply hexed debuff with duration); cooldownIncrease (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Final Whisper
nodes.description: Toads damage +100% to enemies below 25% HP.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.toadsExecuteThreshold (NEW — staff.ts preRoll: per target, if hpPct < hpPercent multiply damageMult by 1 + damageBonus/100)

nodes.name: THE LEAP
nodes.description: Toads fires 1 massive toad (instead of 3) dealing +200% damage. Each soul_stack consumed adds another toad.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.toadsLeapMode (NEW — staff.ts preRoll: hitCount = 1 + soulStackStacks * perSoulStackToad; damageMult *= 1 + soloDamagePercent/100; consume soul_stack)
